text: REFUTED against current code / already fixed. Both sites already use the on.exit + release-flag shape: backend-planning.R:395-426 (keep_out_key, commit 2de7b852) and models-lm.R:610-626 (release_output, commit f3e9ef37). out_key is released exactly once on every path; the unconditional second drop the issue describes no longer exists. Added guard tests/testthat/test-regression-double-drop-guard.R (passes on current code; verified it catches a reintroduced raw double-drop, count=2).
